reference: Hi, I think you should get yourself evaluated first. Please do a thyroid profile, check your prolactin levels, and have an ultrasound for your ovaries. A semen analysis of your husband should also be done. In vitro fertilization injections will increase the chance of pregnancy, but I think you may need to expedite the process by undergoing intrauterine insemination or in vitro fertilization. Please talk to your doctor regarding this.
text: Hi, I think you should get yourself evaluated first. Please do a thyroid profile, check your prolactin levels, and have an ultrasound for your ovaries. A semen analysis of your husband should also be done. In vitro fertilization injections will increase the chance of pregnancy, but I think you may need to expedite the process by undergoing intrauterine insemination or in vitro fertilization. Please talk to your doctor regarding this.
